tasks.title: Scaffold Expo PWA tabs shell and navigation
Build onboarding funnel skeleton with donation CTA route
Fix analytics TypeScript errors and wire provider
Design system tokens and card component library
Home screen MVP with hero carousel
Location service + Prayer times + Islamic date (Aladhan API)
acceptance_criteria: src/lib/location/use-location.ts hook returns { coords, city, country, timezone, status, refresh }
src/lib/location/location-provider.tsx wraps expo-location with permission request + caching to AsyncStorage
Manual city fallback picker with API search via OpenStreetMap

src/lib/prayer/aladhan-client.ts fetches from https://api.aladhan.com/v1/timings/{timestamp}?latitude=X&longitude=Y&method=2, caches response 24h in AsyncStorage keyed by lat/lng rounded to 2 decimals
src/lib/prayer/use-prayer-times.ts hook returns { times, currentPrayer, nextPrayer, countdown, isLoading }
countdown updates every 60s via setInterval, compares wall clock vs prayer time strings
src/lib/prayer/use-islamic-date.ts hook returns { hijriDay, hijriMonth, hijriYear, formatted }
src/lib/prayer/types.ts exports PrayerName, PrayerTimes, IslamicDate types
useQiblah hook calculates bearing to Kaaba using atan2 formula
npm install expo-location
npm run typecheck passes with 0 errors
tasks.implementation_notes: Aladhan API is free, no key needed. OpenStreetMap Nominatim for geocoding. method=2 is ISNA. Response includes timings.Fajr through timings.Isha, date.hijri. Cache with key `prayer_${lat.toFixed(2)}_${lng.toFixed(2)}_${dateString}`. Qiblah bearing formula: atan2(sin(kaaba_lng - user_lng) * cos(kaaba_lat), cos(user_lat) * sin(kaaba_lat) - sin(user_lat) * cos(kaaba_lat) * cos(kaaba_lng - user_lng))

tasks.title: Ambient audio layer for library (bundled loops + mixer)
Tools screen: Tasbih counter and Qiblah compass
acceptance_criteria: Tools tab shows 2 entry cards (Tasbih, Qiblah) using UtilityCard from @/src/components/cards
Tasbih: full-screen dark tap surface, large count display, haptic on each tap via expo-haptics, reset button with confirmation
Tasbih count persists across app restarts via AsyncStorage key 'tasbih_count'
Qiblah: imports useLocation hook from @/src/lib/location/use-location (from T-011), calculates bearing to Kaaba (21.4225, 39.8262) using atan2 formula
Qiblah: shows rotating arrow using expo-sensors magnetometer for device heading, subtracts device heading from Qiblah bearing
Analytics: TOOLS_TASBIH_STARTED, TOOLS_TASBIH_COMPLETED (with count), TOOLS_TASBIH_RESET, TOOLS_QIBLAH_STARTED
npm install expo-haptics expo-sensors
npm run typecheck passes with 0 errors
tasks.implementation_notes: Qiblah bearing formula: bearing = atan2(sin(kaaba_lng - user_lng) * cos(kaaba_lat), cos(user_lat) * sin(kaaba_lat) - sin(user_lat) * cos(kaaba_lat) * cos(kaaba_lng - user_lng)). Convert to degrees. The useLocation hook from T-011 provides { coords: { latitude, longitude } }. If T-011 is not yet merged, create a temporary mock that returns hardcoded NYC coords and import from the same path so it works once T-011 lands. Use theme tokens from @/src/theme for all colors. Use fontFamily from @/src/theme for all text.

tasks.title: Journey screen: Ramadan 30-day tracker
acceptance_criteria: Journey tab shows 30-day grid (6x5 or similar) with numbered day cells
Tapping a day toggles completion state (checkmark or glow effect)
Streak counter at top: 'X Days of Nur' showing consecutive completed days
Import useIslamicDate from @/src/lib/prayer/use-islamic-date (from T-011) to display current Ramadan day number
All completion data persists in AsyncStorage under key 'ramadan_2026_progress' as JSON array of booleans
ShareCard component from @/src/components/cards used for Day 30 share prompt
Analytics: JOURNEY_DAY_COMPLETED, JOURNEY_STREAK_MILESTONE (at 3, 7, 14, 30 days)
Use theme tokens from @/src/theme for all colors, no hardcoded values
npm run typecheck passes with 0 errors
tasks.implementation_notes: If T-011 is not merged yet, create a temporary mock for useIslamicDate that returns { hijriMonth: 'Ramadan', hijriDay: 1 }. The ShareCard component exists at @/src/components/cards/ShareCard.tsx. Ramadan 2026 starts approximately Feb 18. Use AsyncStorage for persistence, no backend needed.

tasks.title: Fix T-013 ambient audio: native asset loading + file size

Audio files are <200KB each (re-encoded to 15s, 64kbps mono)

tasks.implementation_notes: Implemented native requirements and optimized assets.

tasks.title: Fix T-008 Qiblah: use Location.watchHeadingAsync for True North
acceptance_criteria: Replace raw Magnetometer implementation with Location.watchHeadingAsync()
Use `trueHeading` from the event for accurate Kaaba alignment (Magnetometer gives magnetic north)
Handle permissions for location services appropriately (fallback to magnetic heading if location denied? or just error state)
Ensure smooth rotation animation (useReanimated or LayoutAnimation)
tasks.implementation_notes: Raw Magnetometer data is noisy and points to Magnetic North. Location.watchHeadingAsync provides True North which is required for accurate Qiblah direction. The current implementation is functionally correct for magnetic north but geographically inaccurate.

tasks.title: Rework Journey hub and My Streaks interaction flow
acceptance_criteria: Journey hub removes routine/reminder setup UI and focuses on a premium progress hero, strong My Streaks entrypoint, and share surface
Dedicated streak page title becomes 'My Streaks' with calm user-facing copy only
Users can mark Fajr, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, and Isha individually on the streak page
Daily Salah completion is derived from all five prayers, and Salah streaks update from that derived state
Quran, Fasting, and Dhikr remain available as daily streaks with improved interaction design
Existing Journey state migrates safely to the new per-prayer Salah data shape
npm run typecheck passes
npm run check:typography passes
